title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Sugar Cosmetics

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Sugar Cosmetics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
